subcodes.first_line: My Most Exalted Pen hath testified to that which the Tongue of Grandeur did testify before the creation of earth and heaven: that there is none other God but [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد قلمی الاعلی بما شهد لسان العظمه قبل خلق الارض و السماء انه لا اله الا
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @call to action
